doc_title: Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act — 5-Day Notice
label: partial
reason: The core statutory text of 735 ILCS 5/9-209 appears genuine, but the added "Service Requirements" and "Email service" sections are editorial elaborations not found verbatim in the statute, making this a mix of real and supplemental invented
